caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and large black over-ear headphones is seated in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall. He is smiling and laughing while sitting behind a black professional microphone. In his right hand, he holds a red plastic cup. Behind him, a white mannequin wears a white long-sleeved shirt, and clothing racks filled with various garments are visible in the background. The man's t-shirt features the white text "I'VE NEVEZ" above the word "SUN". Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, laughing and slightly shifting his head and shoulders. Two logos are visible on the screen: one on the bottom left consisting of a circle and "THE" and another on the bottom right in red text that reads "THE REAL TALK TOT".
